---

- ### [Copier](https://github.com/Strencher/BetterDiscordStuff/tree/master/Copier "Copier")
    > Allows you to copy certain stuff with custom options.

- ### [InvisibleTyping](https://github.com/Strencher/BetterDiscordStuff/tree/master/InvisibleTyping "InvisibleTyping")
    > Enhanced version of silent typing.

- ### [PlatformIndicators](https://github.com/Strencher/BetterDiscordStuff/tree/master/PlatformIndicators "PlatformIndicators")
    > Adds indicators for every platform that the user is using.

---

## Developer Notice

> [!WARNING]
> This branch contains the **compiled source code** for BetterDiscord plugins. It is **NOT** meant for Pull Requests.
> Please head over to the [`development`](https://github.com/Strencher/BetterDiscordStuff/tree/development) branch, if you want to submit fixes
